calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-20-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amira Day, Esq. and Joseph C. Liburt, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Genetech, Inc.
No appearance by defendants.
Amended Defaults were entered against defendants Martha Murchison, Sterling Winterhalter, BioPharma Search Consultants, Inc., Scientific Staffing Associates, Inc., Martha Murchison Associates, Inc. and Information Technology Recruiting Solutions on February 28, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 12, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at Default Prove-Up Hearing was filed on May 16, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Genentech, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendants: Martha Murchison, Sterling Winterhalter, BioPharma Search Consultants, Inc., Scientific Staffing Associates, Inc., Martha Murchison Associates, Inc. and Information Technology Recruiting Solutions as follows:

Compensatory Damages/Principal - $503.059.00.
Punitive Damages - $500,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $131,784.97.
Costs - $8,779.16, for a total of $1,143,623.13.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
